steps.title: Use the model clue
steps.content: The passage says past climates cannot be observed directly, so researchers use computer models representing conditions consistent with physical evidence. The blank needs a verb for imitating a real system in a model.

steps.title: Select the modeling verb
steps.content: Choice A would mean fabricating the climate. Choice C would mean overstating it. Choice D would mean keeping it unchanged, not studying it in action. Computer models simulate conditions by representing how they work. The answer is B.
